title: Chewy Savory Greek Peanuts Flatbread
description: A crowd‑pleasing, egg‑free Greek flatbread packed with crunchy peanuts and aromatic herbs, perfect as a snack or side.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl combine whole wheat flour, all‑purpose flour, salt, sugar, oregano, dill, and pepper.
Create a well in the center and pour in warm water, olive oil, and Greek yogurt. Mix until a sticky dough forms.
Transfer the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead for about 6 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Shape the dough into a flat, round disc (about 12 inches in diameter). Place it on a parchment‑lined baking sheet.
Pat the surface with a little olive oil and sprinkle the crushed peanuts evenly over it.
Bake in a preheated 220°C (425°F) oven for 18–20 minutes, or until the edges are golden and the flatbread feels firm to the touch.
Remove from the oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then cut into squares or strips and serve warm.
Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 days.
